fields.title: Min Guaranteed
fields.description: The minimum number of this permutation to spawn

fields.title: Weight
fields.description: The ratio of all of the entities that are in the permutation

description: Weighted spawn permutation that selects which entity variant to spawn. Each permutation has an entity identifier and weight—the game randomly chooses between permutations based on relative weights when the spawn rule activates. Creates natural mob variety in spawn distributions.
title: Spawn PermuteType
